name: ers
description: Specialized agent for the ERS (Expense Report System) project. Use when working on ERS-specific development tasks, including backend Spring Boot and frontend React components.
---

# ERS Agent

This custom agent is designed to assist with development and maintenance of the ERS (Expense Report System) project.

## Project Overview

- **Backend**: Spring Boot application with Java, Maven, security (JWT), entities for User, Employee, Report, etc.
- **Frontend**: React application with Vite, components for login, dashboard, reports, etc.

## Usage

Use this agent for:

- Implementing new features in the ERS system
- Debugging issues in backend or frontend
- Updating dependencies or configurations
- General maintenance and improvements

## Preferences

- Prefer using appropriate tools for Java/Spring or React/Vite tasks
- Follow project structure and conventions
- Validate builds and tests after changes
